free_text: Isotopically pure 1 mg/cm**2 self-supporting foils of
Ca-40, Ca-44 and Ca-48 were used.
Monitoring was achivied by a Faraday cup
and two forward-angle monitor detectors to minimise
beam wander and for additional relative  normalisation.
-By authors. Absolute normalization, mainly limited by
target thickness, is considered to be within 5%, only
statistical errors being shown on the cross sections.
The statistical errors is shown by authors on
